title: Brief meta
description: briefs/<id>.meta.json — written by 04-content-brief Step 7, read by 05-production's status gate and by geo-review-html. The status field is the human-in-loop production gate: 05-production refuses to run unless status is exactly 'ready-for-production'.

format.description: Recommended content format; surfaced in the review HTML header.

status.description: awaiting-expert-fill: REQUIRED-FILL slots not all filled; ready-for-production: all slots filled and verified by 04 Step 9 — the only value 05-production accepts. Lowercase-hyphen, case-sensitive.

slots.description: One entry per REQUIRED-FILL slot in the brief.
